chosen_action.title: Probe Apollo Browserless recovery path and fold it into runtime truth

why_this_action.summary: Apollo was still the strongest warm outbound lane, but the runtime only knew it was blocked locally. The highest-leverage same-run repair was to verify whether Browserless was a real recovery path and persist that truth so future loops stop assuming an easy Apollo bypass.
targets_prepared: Ralph Workflow curator follow-up — Codeberg CTA

result.summary: Patched Apollo monitoring to probe Browserless when the local runtime is blocked, reran the Apollo status stack, and confirmed Browserless is also Cloudflare-blocked right now. That makes the truthful next move a different Apollo recovery path, not another Browserless assumption.

apollo_status_after.notes: Cloudflare interstitial detected in response body from https://app.apollo.io/.
